ogTitle: North St Marys vs North Strathfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North St Marys and North Strathfield.
heading: North St Marys vs North Strathfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North St Marys, New South Wales and North Strathfield, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North St Marys has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to North Strathfield (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North St Marys or North Strathfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North St Marys has a flood risk score of 32/100, while North Strathfield scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North St Marys scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. North Strathfield scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North St Marys or North Strathfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North St Marys has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
